$comment: ResourceName -> kit: alias mapping for the mission compile flatten (T-092.2). Derived from the kit:/preset: entries of the mod alias spawn registry (apps/mod/tbd-framework/Data/registry.json) — that registry maps alias -> prefab ResourceName for spawn; this file is its inverse plus per-faction fallbacks. Consumed by the frontend flatten (flattenModDocument.ts) and the Go flatten (internal/services/mission_compile.go via the schema-codegen copy). Editor slots whose assetId has no kit row here flatten to their faction's default kit (with a warning) so the compiled document always satisfies mission.schema.json's kit pattern.
